section.heading: Review and report by Comptroller General
section.chapeau: Not later than 4 years after November 5, 2021, the Comptroller General of the United States shall—

paragraph.content: conduct a thorough review of the programs carried out under this chapter; and

paragraph.chapeau: submit to Congress a detailed report of the findings of the Comptroller General of the United States under the review carried out under paragraph (1), which shall include—

subparagraph.content: an evaluation of the effectiveness of the programs in achieving the purposes of this chapter;
a description of any failure by any recipient of assistance under this chapter to comply with the requirements under this chapter; and
recommendations for any legislative or administrative action that should be taken to improve the achievement of the purposes of this chapter.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: This chapter, referred to in pars. (1) and (2), was in the original “this division”, meaning div. K of Pub. L. 117–58, Nov. 15, 2021, 135 Stat. 1445, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of division K to the Code, see Short Title note set out under section 9501 of this title and Tables.
